steps.title: Identify what the solution represents
steps.content: The solution to a system of equations is the point (or points) that satisfies both equations. Graphically, this is where the two curves intersect.

steps.title: Find and read the intersection from the graph
steps.content: Reading the coordinates from the given graph where the line and parabola meet: the intersection point is $(4, 1)$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
